# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the project..."
    - mkdir -p artifacts
    - touch artifacts/binary
    - echo "configurations" > artifacts/config.yaml
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy_dev:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to development environment..."
    - cp artifacts/binary /deploy/path/
    - cp artifacts/config.yaml /deploy/path/
    - echo "Executing deployment..."
    - /deploy/path/binary --config /deploy/path/config.yaml

deploy_prod:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - cp artifacts/binary /deploy/path/
    - cp artifacts/config.yaml /deploy/path/
    - echo "Executing deployment..."
    - /deploy/path/binary --config /deploy/path/config.yaml
  only:
    - main
